ogTitle: Joel South vs Johanna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Joel South and Johanna.
heading: Joel South vs Johanna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Joel South, Victoria and Johanna, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Joel South and Johanna have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Joel South or Johanna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Joel South has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Johanna scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Joel South scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Johanna scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Joel South or Johanna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Joel South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
